2604.11378.title: From Agent Loops to Structured Graphs:A Scheduler-Theoretic Framework for LLM Agent Execution
2604.11378.paper_summary: The dominant paradigm for building LLM based agents is the Agent Loop, an iterative cycle where a single language model decides what to do next by reading an ever growing context window. This paradigm has three structural weaknesses: implicit dependencies between steps, unbounded recovery loops, and mutable execution history that complicates debugging. We characterize the Agent Loop as a single ready unit scheduler: at any moment, at most one executable unit is active, and the choice of which unit to activate comes from opaque LLM inference rather than an inspectable policy. This perspective places Agent Loops and graph based execution engines on a single semantic continuum. We propose SGH, Structured Graph Harness, which lifts control flow from implicit context into an explicit static DAG. SGH makes three commitments: execution plans are immutable within a plan version, planning execution and recovery are separated into three layers, and recovery follows a strict escalation protocol. These choices trade some expressiveness for controllability, verifiability, and implementability. Our contributions are fourfold: a scheduler unified framework that applies classical scheduling theory to LLM agent execution and identifies challenges introduced by non deterministic LLM nodes; a trade off analysis of controllability, expressiveness, and implementability across 70 surveyed systems; a formal specification including a node state machine with termination and soundness guarantees; and an attributable experimental framework with a seven group design for future validation. This is a position paper and design proposal. We provide a theoretical framework, design analysis, and experimental protocol, not a production implementation or empirical results.
2604.11378.paper_summary_zh: 主流的 LLM 基礎代理構建範式是代理循環（Agent Loop），這是一個迭代循環，其中單一語言模型通過閱讀不斷增長的上下文窗口來決定下一步該做什麼。這一範式有三個結構性弱點：步驟之間的隱含依賴、無界限的恢復循環，以及可變的執行歷史，這使得調試變得複雜。我們將代理循環描述為一個單一的就緒單元調度器：在任何時刻，最多只有一個可執行單元是活動的，而激活哪個單元的選擇來自不透明的 LLM 推理，而不是可檢查的策略。這一觀點將代理循環和基於圖的執行引擎置於單一的語義連續體上。我們提出 SGH，結構化圖形控制（Structured Graph Harness），它將控制流從隱含上下文提升到明確的靜態有向無環圖（DAG）。SGH 做出三項承諾：執行計劃在計劃版本內是不可變的，規劃執行和恢復被分為三個層次，並且恢復遵循嚴格的升級協議。這些選擇在可控性、可驗證性和可實施性之間進行了一定的表達能力的權衡。我們的貢獻有四個方面：一個統一的調度框架，將經典調度理論應用於 LLM 代理執行，並識別非確定性 LLM 節點帶來的挑戰；對 70 個調查系統的可控性、表達能力和可實施性進行的權衡分析；包括終止和健全性保證的節點狀態機的正式規範；以及一個具有七組設計的可歸因實驗框架，以便於未來的驗證。這是一篇立場論文和設計提案。我們提供一個理論框架、設計分析和實驗協議，而不是生產實現或實證結果。
2604.11378.author: Hu Wei et.al.
